## Description {#description}

Contains a list of all macros defined in server configuration.

## Columns {#columns}

<!--AUTOGENERATED_START-->
- `macro` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — The macro name.
- `substitution` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — The substitution string.
